services-hourly.heading: Long Term Luxury Car Rental Dubai: Hourly & Monthly Rolls-Royce Hire
services-hourly.quickAnswer: Rolls-Royce Dubai offers hourly luxury car rental from AED 800 (2-hour min) plus discounted weekly and monthly long-term rates, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai.
keyFacts: Hourly Rolls-Royce hire starts at AED 800 with a 2-hour minimum; daily rates run from AED 3,800 (Ghost) to AED 7,500 (Spectre).
Long-term rentals get discounted weekly and monthly rates; choose chauffeur-driven or self-drive (for qualifying renters).
Free delivery across Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR, Business Bay, DIFC, Deira and Jumeirah (plus Abu Dhabi).
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp/phone +971 55 816 4922 or info@rollsroycers.com; service in English, Arabic and Russian.
body: Looking for long term luxury car rental Dubai with the freedom to choose your own schedule? Naqra FZE offers Rolls-Royce by the hour or by the month, each booking with a professional chauffeur and free delivery anywhere in Dubai. Hire a Ghost from AED 3,800/day or a Cullinan from AED 6,500/day for business meetings, shopping in Downtown, or relaxed days along Jumeirah.

Our hourly service suits airport transfers, photo shoots, and special occasions, while monthly contracts give residents and visitors lasting value on long term luxury car rental Dubai. Reserve a Phantom, Dawn, Wraith, or Spectre 24/7 over WhatsApp, with multilingual support throughout. Tell us your dates and route, and we deliver the car ready to drive across Dubai and the wider UAE.

faqs.question: How much is a Rolls-Royce for a month in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Monthly Rolls-Royce rental is priced from the daily rate with a long-term discount. The Ghost starts at AED 3,800/day, the Phantom at AED 5,800, and the Cullinan at AED 6,500. Tell us your dates on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922 and we will quote a fixed monthly rate including free delivery.

faqs.question: What does a weekly luxury car rental in Dubai cost?
faqs.answer: Weekly Rolls-Royce rental is calculated from the daily rate (Ghost AED 3,800, Wraith AED 5,000, Dawn AED 5,500) with a reduced weekly rate for 7+ days. Mileage allowance and free delivery within Dubai are included.

faqs.question: Is long-term Rolls-Royce rental available with a driver?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every model is available with a professional multilingual chauffeur for the full term, or self-drive for qualifying renters. Chauffeur cover can run weekly or monthly to suit business or residency needs.

faqs.question: How much is a Rolls-Royce rental in Dubai per hour?
faqs.answer: Hourly rental starts at AED 800/hour for the Ghost with a 2-hour minimum and chauffeur included. After 6 hours the full-day rate applies, and longer stays move to discounted weekly and monthly rates.

faqs.question: What documents do I need for a long-term rental in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Chauffeured rentals require only your passport or Emirates ID for the booking. Self-drive needs a valid UAE or international driving licence and passport. A refundable deposit applies; we confirm everything before delivery.
